properties.label: State Definition
properties.description: Selects which state definition to use from the model's configured state maps (e.g., SingleNode, NodeRange, or custom state definitions).
Choose between selecting a named state directly or driving states from a timing track. Each timing mark's label is matched to a state name.

properties.label: Mode
properties.description: Controls how timing track labels are interpreted. 'Default' uses labels as state names directly. 'Countdown' treats labels as numbers and counts down. 'Time Countdown' counts down from a time value (MM:SS). 'Number' displays digits for numeric values. 'Iterate' cycles through the listed states over the timing interval.

properties.label: Color
properties.description: Controls how palette colors are assigned to active states. 'Graduate' blends through the palette over time. 'Cycle' assigns a different palette color to each timing interval. 'Allocate' assigns a fixed palette color based on the state's index number.

properties.label: Fade(ms)
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds for states to fade in and out at the start and end of each timing interval. Set to 0 for instant on/off switching.
